creator: w.schwarzenfeld@aon.at
text:
Something was puzzled in the clipboard, the second part should be

========================================
if I change
CFLAGS+=        -I${LOCALBASE}/include -L${LOCALBASE}/lib
to
CFLAGS+=        -I${LOCALBASE}/include 
LDFLAGS+=        -L${LOCALBASE}/lib
